title: EMP / CME
description: Prepare for extended grid-down caused by solar or high-altitude EMP event.

items.text: Minimum 90-day water supply or reliable long-term purification system in place
Minimum 90-day food supply of non-perishables requiring no refrigeration
Faraday cage built for critical electronics (metal trash can, foam-lined, tight lid)
Backup NOAA/HAM radio stored in Faraday cage — test before sealing
Solar charger and power bank stored in Faraday cage
Flashlights with spare batteries in Faraday cage
Medications — as long a supply as possible (no restocking in extended grid-down)
Cash on hand — banking infrastructure may be unavailable for weeks to months
Older vehicle with minimal electronics identified or owned as backup transportation
Manual tools for food production and home maintenance (non-electric hand tools)
Heirloom seed supply for food production — stored properly in cool, dark location
Community network established — neighbors and local contacts who can share resources
Security plan for extended period — community watch, safe room, group protocols
Medical supplies for self-care — hospitals and pharmacies will be overwhelmed indefinitely
All important account numbers, contacts, and records documented on paper
Non-electric heat source (wood stove, propane) for cold climate survival
